response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to agentic workflows at re:cinq, but lacks demonstrable production-scale multi-agent AI systems in fintech, regulatory compliance experience, or leadership scaling teams beyond 10–15 people — key requirements for this CTO role.
strengths: Hands-on experience with agentic frameworks and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Proven ability to build and deploy event-driven, scalable systems (GISCollective, DLang microservices)
Strong engineering culture advocacy (TDD, CI/CD, workshops, open-source leadership)
concerns: No clear evidence of building or operating multi-agent AI systems in regulated fintech environments
Lacks documented experience scaling engineering teams beyond 10–15 people or leading senior technical leadership layers
Minimal indication of financial infrastructure domain knowledge (credit risk, working capital, compliance)
